title: Middleware Pipeline
description: DelegatingChatClient middleware composes cross-cutting concerns around the chat client.

steps.annotation: The request enters the outermost middleware layer.
Each middleware wraps the next, forming an onion around the core client.

steps.content: LoggingMiddleware: log request metadata, pass to inner client
steps.annotation: The logging layer records the incoming request before delegating.

steps.content: CachingMiddleware: cache miss, pass to inner client, cache response
steps.annotation: The caching layer checks for a stored response before calling the LLM.

steps.content: TelemetryMiddleware: start span, call inner client, end span
steps.annotation: The telemetry layer measures latency around the actual LLM call.

steps.content: Middleware wraps the chat client with composable layers. Each layer handles one concern: logging, caching, or telemetry. The core client stays unchanged.
steps.annotation: The response unwinds back through each middleware in reverse order.

steps.content:
TelemetryMiddleware: record duration
CachingMiddleware: store response
LoggingMiddleware: log completion
steps.annotation: Each middleware processes the response on the way out, same as on the way in.
